title: helictochloa occidentalis
intro: Helictochloa occidentalis, also known as Western Wheat Grass, is a perennial grass native to North America, characterized by its slender stems and narrow leaves. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and promote antioxidant activity. The health benefits of Helictochloa occidentalis include supporting immune function, reducing oxidative stress, and possibly alleviating symptoms of conditions such as arthritis. The plant can be prepared as a dietary supplement, typically in the form of capsules or powders, and is also used in herbal teas, juices, and tinctures.
